title: Front Office Manager - Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces Consulting Pvt Ltd!
